lessons.title: The Null Problem 🕳️
lessons.description: Discover what 'nil' is and how Swift's Optionals solve it.

lessons.title: Opening the Box 🎁
lessons.description: Learn how to safely unwrap an Optional (and how to maliciously smash it).

lessons.title: The 'guard let' Bouncer 🛡️
lessons.description: A cleaner, safer way to handle missing data early.

lessons.title: Nil-Coalescing Operator ?? 🪂
lessons.description: Provide a default fallback value if the box is empty.
